scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && npm run typecheck
scripts.build:frontend: cd artifacts/ecg-insight && npx expo export --platform web --output-dir ../../dist
scripts.build:production: npm run build && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: eslint server/src prisma artifacts/ecg-insight/app artifacts/ecg-insight/components artifacts/ecg-insight/context artifacts/ecg-insight/data artifacts/ecg-insight/hooks artifacts/ecg-insight/services --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && tsx scripts/ecg-acquisition.test.ts && tsx scripts/ecg-digitization.integration.ts && tsx scripts/ecg-end-to-end-analysis.integration.ts && tsx scripts/patient-case-management.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint27-occupational-cardiology.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint28-subscription-platform.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint29-production-infrastructure.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint30-mobile-pwa.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint31-payment-platform.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint32-notification-center.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint33-collaboration-platform.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint34-cdss.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint35-longitudinal-ecg.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint36-security-hardening.integration.ts && tsx scripts/sprint37-release-candidate.integration.ts && tsx scripts/auth-session-hardening.integration.ts && tsx scripts/dashboard-production-lockdown.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-conversation-pipeline.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-intent-classifier.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-ai-brain-v3.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-final-closure.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-workspace-foundation.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-stabilization.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-medical-knowledge-rag.integration.ts && tsx scripts/copilot-enterprise-workspace.integration.ts && tsx scripts/ecg-medical-report-system.integration.ts && tsx scripts/ecg-pro-viewer-workspace.test.ts && tsx scripts/monetization.integration.ts && tsx scripts/super-admin.integration.ts && tsx scripts/owner-security.integration.ts && tsx scripts/enterprise-auth.integration.ts && tsx scripts/auth-production-stabilization.integration.ts && tsx scripts/clinical-workflow.integration.ts
